user.title: Brink Home Ventilation
user.description: Please login to your Brink Home portal services account.

data_description.username: The email address you use to log into the Brink Home portal.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Brink Home
reauth_confirm.description: Your session for {username} has expired. Please enter your password to re-authenticate.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Brink Home
reconfigure.description: Update your Brink Home portal credentials.

data_description.username: The email address you use to log into the Brink Home portal.

error.cannot_connect: Can't connect to the Brink Home portal. Try again later.

abort.account_mismatch: The account does not match the one being reconfigured.

data_description.scan_interval: How often (in seconds) to poll the Brink Home API for updates.
data_description.freezing_threshold: Temperature (°C) below which winter mode activates. Affects ventilation levels to reduce preheater electricity usage.
data_description.temperature_source_entity: Optional: select a temperature sensor entity. If empty, the Brink unit's fresh air temperature sensor is used.

extra_ventilation.title: Extra Ventilation
extra_ventilation.description: Configure the extra ventilation boost feature.

data_description.extra_vent_duration: How long (in minutes) the extra ventilation boost runs.
data_description.extra_vent_summer_level: Ventilation level during boost when outdoor temperature is above the freezing threshold.
data_description.extra_vent_winter_level: Ventilation level during boost when outdoor temperature is below the freezing threshold. Lower levels reduce preheater electricity usage.

ha_automated.title: HA Automated Mode
ha_automated.description: Configure automatic ventilation control based on humidity sensors.

data_description.auto_summer_base_level: Normal ventilation level in summer (above freezing threshold).
data_description.auto_winter_base_level: Normal ventilation level in winter (below freezing threshold).
data_description.humidity_sensor_1: Optional: first humidity sensor to monitor for spikes (e.g., bathroom).
data_description.humidity_sensor_2: Optional: second humidity sensor to monitor.
data_description.humidity_sensor_3: Optional: third humidity sensor to monitor.
data_description.humidity_spike_threshold: Humidity increase (%) within 3 minutes that triggers extra ventilation boost.

error.scan_interval_too_low: Scan interval must be at least 15 seconds.
error.scan_interval_out_of_range: Scan interval must be between 15 and 300 seconds.

parameter_unavailable.message: Parameter not available for {entity_key}. The device may be offline.

gateway_unavailable.message: Cannot send command: gateway not available. The Brink Home portal may be experiencing issues.

parameter_read_only.message: Cannot send command: parameter {entity_key} is read-only.

write_queued.message: Command queued — will retry when connection is restored.

gateway_not_available.title: Gateway not available for {device_name}
gateway_not_available.description: The gateway for your Brink ventilation device "{device_name}" is not reachable. Write commands (changing mode, ventilation level, bypass) will not work until the gateway comes back online. Check that your Brink device is powered on and connected to the internet.
